# PRD: mcp-graph — Self-Test Benchmark Suite

## Overview
Build a comprehensive benchmark and validation suite for the mcp-graph project itself, covering the graph engine, dashboard UI, and integration mesh.

## Constraints
- TypeScript 5.x strict mode, ESM only
- Node.js >= 18, no external infra
- Vitest for unit/integration, Playwright for E2E
- SQLite in-memory for test isolation
- All tests must complete in < 60s total

## Risks
- Large graph datasets may slow ReactFlow rendering
- SSE connections may timeout during long test runs
- Playwright browser startup adds ~3s overhead per spec

---

## Epic 1: Graph Engine Validation

### Task 1.1: SQLite Store CRUD Benchmark
- **Size:** M
- **Priority:** high
- **Depends on:** none
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Measure insert/read/update/delete throughput for 1000 nodes
  - Verify transaction isolation with concurrent operations
  - Assert query performance < 50ms for filtered reads
  - Validate FTS5 search returns ranked results

### Task 1.2: PRD Parser Accuracy Test
- **Size:** S
- **Priority:** high
- **Depends on:** none
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Parse 5 different PRD formats (markdown, plain text, mixed)
  - Verify entity extraction accuracy > 95%
  - Validate parent-child relationships are preserved
  - Assert edge creation for explicit dependencies

### Task 1.3: Context Compression Benchmark
- **Size:** L
- **Priority:** medium
- **Depends on:** Task 1.1
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Measure compression ratio for tasks with 0, 1, 5, 10 dependencies
  - Verify token budget enforcement (hard cap)
  - Assert BM25 scoring produces relevant context
  - Compare tiered vs flat compression performance

### Task 1.4: Dependency Chain Resolution
- **Size:** M
- **Priority:** high
- **Depends on:** Task 1.1, Task 1.2
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Resolve chains up to 10 levels deep
  - Detect and report circular dependencies
  - Verify topological sort correctness
  - Assert blocked task identification accuracy

---

## Epic 2: Dashboard UI Validation

### Task 2.1: ReactFlow Graph Rendering
- **Size:** L
- **Priority:** high
- **Depends on:** Task 1.1
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Render graph with 50+ nodes without performance degradation
  - Verify node positioning (dagre layout)
  - Assert edge connections match dependency data
  - Validate zoom/pan interactions work smoothly

### Task 2.2: Tab Navigation and Data Consistency
- **Size:** M
- **Priority:** high
- **Depends on:** Task 2.1
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - All 5 tabs load without errors
  - Node counts consistent across Graph, Insights, Benchmark tabs
  - Progress bar in PRD & Backlog matches completion percentage
  - Theme toggle works across all tabs

### Task 2.3: Search and Filter System
- **Size:** M
- **Priority:** medium
- **Depends on:** Task 2.1
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Text search filters table in real-time
  - Type filters (epic, task, milestone) work independently
  - Status filters (backlog, ready, in_progress, done) combine with type
  - Clear button resets all filters
  - Sort by column headers works for all columns

### Task 2.4: Real-time Updates via SSE
- **Size:** L
- **Priority:** high
- **Depends on:** Task 2.1
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Dashboard receives SSE events within 2s of API changes
  - Node creation via API reflects in graph immediately
  - Status updates propagate to all tabs
  - Edge creation updates relationship panel

---

## Epic 3: Integration Mesh Validation

### Task 3.1: Serena Code Intelligence
- **Size:** XL
- **Priority:** medium
- **Depends on:** Task 2.2
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Code Graph tab shows Serena status badge
  - Explorer mode displays file tree
  - Symbol search returns relevant code symbols
  - Memory count badge updates correctly

### Task 3.2: GitNexus On-Demand Activation
- **Size:** M
- **Priority:** medium
- **Depends on:** Task 2.2
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - GitNexus badge shows "Inactive" by default
  - "Analyze & Start" button triggers activation
  - After activation, badge shows "Active" with stats
  - Git graph data populates Code Graph tab

### Task 3.3: Context7 Documentation Sync
- **Size:** S
- **Priority:** low
- **Depends on:** Task 1.1
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - sync_stack_docs detects project dependencies
  - Documentation cache stores fetched docs
  - RAG pipeline includes doc context in queries
  - Cache invalidation works for updated deps

### Task 3.4: End-to-End Pipeline Validation
- **Size:** XL
- **Priority:** high
- **Depends on:** Task 3.1, Task 3.2, Task 3.3
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Import PRD → navigate all tabs → verify data consistency
  - CRUD operations via API reflected in dashboard
  - Cross-tab data matches MCP stats output
  - Full benchmark run produces valid token economy metrics
